hub-shell-detector.evidence: Marketing hub routes (BrandIntelligenceHub, CampaignBuilder, Campaigns) have live data hooks, loading/empty/error states, and no stub-only shells after MKT-POWER-01 changes.

live-demo-detector.evidence: BrandIntelligenceHub and CampaignBuilder surfaces that show signals or campaign metrics respect isLive and DEMO/LIVE labeling; no unlabeled mock marketing data introduced by MKT-POWER-01.

cta-validator.evidence: Signal → Create campaign CTA from Intelligence/BrandIntelligenceHub flows to marketing routes that keep intelligence-first framing; no commerce-first CTAs on intelligence surfaces.

route-mapper.evidence: Routes for marketing (/portal/marketing/campaigns/new, /brand/campaigns/new) map correctly from CrossHubActionDispatcher create_campaign actions; no orphan or duplicate marketing hubs after MKT-POWER-01.

accessibility-checker.evidence: CampaignBuilder and related forms have labeled inputs, focusable CTAs, and heading structure consistent with Pearl Mineral V2; basic keyboard navigation works.

marketing-alignment-checker.evidence: Campaign CTAs and copy emphasize intelligence-driven targeting rather than generic blasts; no cold-outreach patterns or banned marketing language added in MKT-POWER-01.

no_dead_ends.evidence: From Intelligence/BrandIntelligenceHub → Create Campaign → CampaignBuilder, users always have a clear path to review/save a campaign and navigate back; no one-way dead-end screens introduced.

loading_empty_error_states.evidence: Marketing pages touched by MKT-POWER-01 retain existing loading/empty/error handling for campaign lists and signal context; no new data-bound views were added without these states.

cta_hierarchy_ok.evidence: Primary CTAs on intelligence surfaces remain intelligence-first (e.g., "Create campaign from this signal"), with commerce/paywall CTAs secondary or absent per doctrine.

demo_live_labeling_ok.evidence: Marketing views using signal-derived context do not introduce unlabeled DEMO data; DEMO badges and timestamps flow from existing intelligence components.

provenance_visible_or_linked.evidence: Campaign creation flows launched from signals preserve fromSignal/signal_id context, and users can trace back to the originating signal from CampaignBuilder or via breadcrumbs.

a11y_smoke_ok.evidence: Form controls and CTAs in CampaignBuilder and related marketing views have accessible labels and are reachable via keyboard.
